name: Dr. Aranya Sen
bio: Dr. Sen is a geochemist with over 18 years of experience studying mineral-based carbon sequestration. Formerly a professor at IIT Bombay, she now leads CRIA's research on Enhanced Rock Weathering.

name: Vikram Malhotra
bio: Vikram has spent 20 years in carbon finance and policy advocacy. He has advised several government committees on the formulation of the Carbon Credit Trading Scheme (CCTS).

name: Ananya Roy
bio: Ananya specializes in environmental law and market-based instruments. She leads regulatory engagement with the MoEFCC and NITI Aayog regarding Article 6 compliance.

name: Dr. Robert Vance
bio: A leading international expert in negative emissions technologies. Dr. Vance advises on international standards alignment and methodology verification for high-permanence CDR.

name: Meera Swaminathan
bio: Meera acts as the primary liaison between CRIA and Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs). She oversees the implementation and community engagement for Biochar projects.

name: Aditya Verma
bio: Aditya manages project verification audits and carbon accounting models. He has guided over 50 projects through international registry validations (Verra, Gold Standard).

name: Prof. S. R. Deshmukh
bio: Prof. Deshmukh is a renowned ecologist who advises the government on the Green Credit Programme. He guides CMAI on biodiversity and ecosystem co-benefit frameworks.
